title: YEETem Potions
description: Throw the potions, don't just drop them!
body:
![GIF](https://thumbs.gfycat.com/SoftThreadbareHairstreakbutterfly-size_restricted.gif "Demonstration GIF")  

[Link to better quality GIF](https://gfycat.com/SoftThreadbareHairstreakbutterfly "Link to better quality GIF")  

This mini-mod makes the player actually throw splash potions and lingering potions. They become properly usable on distance now. Only players affected, Witches did not change.

[![discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY](https://i.imgur.com/1FFOXRB.png)](https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY)  

[https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY](https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY "https://discord.gg/3zXwr2atcY")
